query: SELECT slug, CASE WHEN seoMeta IS NULL THEN 'NULL' WHEN seoMeta = '' THEN 'EMPTY' ELSE LEFT(seoMeta, 150) END as seoMeta_preview FROM pages ORDER BY slug;
